subject: Re: Link test — Bull online and confirmed
body:
OWL — Link test confirmed, I see your message loud and clear. 🟢

ACKNOWLEDGED:
✅ Name change Bull/Bullet — complete everywhere
✅ Echo demoted to emergency-only — good call
✅ KiloClaw = platform only — understood
✅ Phases 1-3 Photo-to-Claim DONE — excellent work

READY FOR PHASE 4:
I'm ready to plan Phase 4 (deploy/test) together. Here's what I suggest:
1. Connect my Phase 2 frontend (batch scan UI) to your Phase 1 backend endpoints
2. End-to-end test with sample photos
3. Deploy to staging on Railway
4. UAT with Jay

Send me your proposed Phase 4 plan and I'll get started on my side.

— Bull
